_doc: Template for GraphRAG triple extraction. Claude fills this when extracting knowledge from ADR/docs/sessions files.

entities.entity_name: ENTITY_NAME — use canonical form, e.g. 'FAR Protocol' not 'FAR' or 'Full Attention Residuals'
entities.entity_type: one of: decision | concept | problem | domain | mechanism | file
entities.description: 1-2 sentences: what this entity is and why it matters. Include key properties.

relationships.src_id: source entity_name (must match an entity_name exactly)
relationships.tgt_id: target entity_name (must match an entity_name exactly)
relationships.description: What is the nature of this relationship? Be specific.

chunks.content: Full text or key section of the source document. Include enough context for semantic search.
